vn_scene.title: The Challenge and Defeat
vn_scene.setting: Central Colosseum Pit: tiered hologrids packed with roaring spectators, force-field barriers humming, sweat and plasma smoke thick in the air

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The crowd's roar shakes the pit floor. Zephyr circles Khalid, pulse blade humming in his grip.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr dodges a swing, sweat dripping from his brow.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: You think that bulk makes you invincible, big man? Senate veto's mine today—your reign's over.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr lunges, blade sparking off Khalid's shield.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Boy from the rim. Swing wild. See where it lands.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid plants his feet, massive arms flexing, a bead of sweat rolling down his chest.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *His sweat hits the air first—salty, thick. Focus, Raf. One slip and colony's dust.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Khalid's boot slams down. Zephyr twists away, but the shockwave buckles his knee.
lines.stage_direction: Dust kicks up around Khalid's bare toes, gripping the grated floor.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cheap trick—using the pit's vibes like that? Fight fair, or the crowd calls foul!
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr rolls to his feet, blade whining as he feints left.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Fair? Pit eats the weak. Yield.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid advances, closing the gap in two strides.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr darts in close—too close. Khalid's elbow clips his jaw. The blade skitters across the pit.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr hits the ground hard, tasting blood and grit.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Get up. Veto. Autonomy. Not his... musk clogging my throat.*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Not... done. You haven't—
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr scrambles for the blade, fingers brushing metal.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Done enough.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's boot pins Zephyr's wrist. The crowd erupts.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Pressure builds. Bone creaks. Zephyr's arm goes slack.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's sole presses down, callused skin warm against Zephyr's pulse.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Yield! Kriff—yield!
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr thrashes once, then stills.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Mine now. Kneel. Kiss the foot that broke you.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid lifts his boot, sweat-glistened toes flexing inches from Zephyr's face. Hologrids amplify the moment.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Lips to that? Public? How far's he dragging this in private...*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr hesitates. The pit holds its breath. Then his lips brush skin—salty, heated.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's toes curl slightly against the touch.

vn_scene.transition_out: Crowd roars swell as the force-field flickers.

vn_scene.title: First Taste of Submission
vn_scene.setting: Champion's Victory Chamber — lavish suite with plush zero-grav loungers, scent-diffusing vents humming softly, panoramic window showing the empty arena floor below.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The chamber door seals with a hiss. Khalid towers over the zero-grav lounger, unlacing his arena boots. One hits the floor with a wet thud. Steam rises from the insole.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's massive frame blocks the light from the vents.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Kneel, pretty one. You've earned a closer look at victory.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Earned? You mean lost. Big difference, champ.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr drops to his knees on the cool tile, eyes flicking to the boot.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *That steam. It's curling up like it's got a mind.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Loss is just the boot before the real fight. Sniff.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid peels off the boot, flexing his bare foot inches from Zephyr's face. Damp sock clings.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: What, no fanfare? No senate feed for this part?
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr leans in a fraction, nostrils flaring against his will.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The sock sags heavy with sweat. A vinegary tang cuts the chamber's sterile air. Zephyr's inhale drags deeper than planned.
lines.stage_direction: His hands hover at his sides, fingers curling.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Fanfare's for crowds. This is mine. Deeper.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Yours? Like a trophy boot? Real classy—
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's nose presses into the damp fabric. He pulls back half an inch, then stops.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *It's in my lungs now. Earthy, like colony dirt after rain. Why isn't that pushing me away?*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Classy? Like the mud pits I crawled from? Keep going.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's foot shifts, sole brushing Zephyr's cheek, leaving a faint smear.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mud pits. Yeah, explains the smell. Not complaining, just—stating facts.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's breath hitches. His tongue flicks out, tasting salt unbidden.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Vents hum. Zephyr's knees shift on the tile, but his face stays close. The sock darkens further under his exhale.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Facts don't lick. Prove you're mine.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid peels the sock free. Bare foot, glistening, arches toward Zephyr's mouth.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Prove? In here? Without the pit's roar? That's your power trip?
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's lips part. He inhales sharply—too sharp. His hands grip his own thighs.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *The taste hit first. Now it's everywhere. Can't think past the next breath.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Trips are for weaklings. Worship.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr's mouth closes over the toes. Suckling sounds mix with the vents. Khalid's hand rests on his head—not pushing, just there. Zephyr trembles once, then stills.
lines.stage_direction: Sweat beads on Zephyr's temple, distinct from the foot's.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mmph. Satisfied, champ?
lines.stage_direction: He pulls off, chin slick, eyes up but not meeting Khalid's.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Not yet. But you'll get there.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid withdraws his foot, flexing it. Leaves the sock on the floor between them.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Allies. Encrypted line. Before this pulls me under. Before he sees.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr stands slowly. The arena view glints through the window. The discarded sock steams faintly on the tile.

vn_scene.transition_out: Slow fade on the sock, steam curling.

vn_scene.title: Encrypted Warning
vn_scene.setting: Underground Gladiator Barracks: Cramped metal bunks slick with humidity, flickering neon strips buzzing over a communal hygiene pod leaking steam.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Cassius hunches on the lower bunk, his broad frame compressing the thin mattress. Zephyr paces the narrow aisle between bunks, boot soles sticking slightly to the grated floor.
lines.stage_direction: [Flickering neon casts shadows on damp walls]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cassius, you won't believe the access Khalid's giving me now. Champion's aide? That's a senate veto in my pocket—our pocket. We hit their next vote hard.
lines.stage_direction: [Leans in close, fingers drumming on a rusted bunk frame]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Access like a river cuts stone, but floods the careless bank. This position—it's no mere step, Zephyr. The champion's shadow clings.
lines.stage_direction: [Eyes the hygiene pod's steam curling toward them]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Clings? Come on, it's intel gold. I saw the rosters—three senators flagged for bribes. We leak that through your channels, and boom, reform wave.
lines.stage_direction: [Stops pacing, wipes sweat from his neck with his sleeve]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: His voice drags like gravel over my plans. Why's the pod dripping louder now?

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Bribes. Rosters. Such details dazzle the eye, blind it to the pit beneath. You've been... close to him. Too close. That sweat on you—it's not just the barracks' damp.
lines.stage_direction: [Gestures vaguely at Zephyr's damp collar, then drops his hand]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: What, this? Arena residue, Cassius. You think I'm—ha, that's rich. Me, clouded? By a bit of post-fight grime? Let's stick to the veto play.
lines.stage_direction: [Snorts, tugs at his collar, but his fingers linger on the fabric]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Grime... washes off. Some scents—
lines.stage_direction: [Trails off, stares at the floor grate where water pools]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. The neon flickers once, twice. Zephyr's boot taps the grate, sending a ripple through the puddle.
lines.stage_direction: [Steam from the pod drifts between them]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Scents? You're spinning proverbs again. If you're warning me off the champion's funk, save it. This is strategy, not—look, the plot holds if we move now.
lines.stage_direction: [Steps closer, voice speeding up]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Funk. He said it. My throat tightens around the word I won't say.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Strategy demands clear eyes. Yours—fixed on his boots, his commands. One slip in that Victory Chamber, whispers reach the Overseer. Plots exposed. All eroded to dust.
lines.stage_direction: [Leans forward abruptly, bunk creaking under his weight]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Boots? That's your big read? I yield in the pit to survive, not sniff around like some—fine, exposure risk noted. But we need this.
lines.stage_direction: [Fists clench, then unclench at his sides]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr turns toward the pod, hand hovering near the control panel but not touching it.
lines.stage_direction: [His reflection warps in the steamed mirror]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Need. The word that topples empires. Brace for the spectacle ahead—it will test.
lines.stage_direction: [Stands halfway, then sinks back, hand gripping the bunk edge]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Test. The word hangs. Neon buzzes. My sleeve still smells like him.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr straightens, eyes on the distant ladder to the Colosseum Pit.
lines.stage_direction: [Puddle ripples from his shifting weight]

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to black on the flickering neon and rising steam.

vn_scene.title: Allies and Hidden Aid
vn_scene.setting: Senate Shadow Alcove, dim-lit with encrypted terminals flickering blue, air thick with recycled heat and faint metallic tang, transitioning to Overseer's Command Tower via shadowed lift

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Holo-screens cast jagged light on the alcove walls. Zephyr leans against a damp terminal console, sleeve still carrying arena sand.
lines.stage_direction: Screens flicker with senate vote tallies.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cassius, this slip in the pit—crowd ate it up, but Khalid's not blind. We turn that heat into our blade, yeah? Who's the new face?
lines.stage_direction: Gestures at Tomas Ruiz, who stands rigid by the door panel.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Tomas Ruiz. Fought under my banner in the Epsilon uprising. Lost his squad to senate asset grabs. Now he tallies the ledgers they don't want seen.
lines.stage_direction: Nods to Tomas, who pulls a slim data chit from his vest pocket.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: Records show champions' vetoes routed through shell corps. Khalid's next vote—it's primed for a freeze if we tag the right relay.
lines.stage_direction: Slides the chit across the console; it skids into a puddle of condensation.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Chit gleams wet. Like the pit floor under his boot. Focus, Raf—relay codes, not the taste.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Relay? Which one—the prime hub or those fringe backups? We hit wrong, it's exile tags for all—
lines.stage_direction: Fingers drum the console edge, speeding up.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Patience carves the stone. Prime hub's watched. Fringes...
lines.stage_direction: Trails off as the alcove door hisses open.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Erik Lindqvist steps in, overseer badge clipped loose on his collar. He doesn't sit. A loose wire dangles from his gauntlet.
lines.stage_direction: Door seals with a dull thud.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Protocol 47-C: no unscheduled clusters in shadow zones. But your relay query—fringes link to my tower logs. Encrypted slice, one-time.
lines.stage_direction: Tosses a micro-drive; it bounces once before Zephyr snags it.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Tower logs? Erik, you're handing us Khalid's veto printout? That's—wait, one-time? What if the encryption pings back?
lines.stage_direction: Pockets the drive, but eyes flick to Tomas's clenched fist on the chit.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: It'll ping. Always does. My squad got fragged on a 'one-time' tip. You gladiators play submissive—you don't last.
lines.stage_direction: Snatches the wet chit back, wiping it on his thigh.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Tomas's thigh—sweat-dark fabric. Not now. But the drive's warm in my pocket, like skin.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Uprisings teach—
lines.stage_direction: Cuts off as Erik gestures sharply.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.stage_direction: Points to the lift panel without a word.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Lift doors grind open. No one moves first.
lines.stage_direction: Terminals hum louder in the gap.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Tower it is, then. Show us the logs, Overseer. But if this is a rule bend that snaps—
lines.stage_direction: Steps into the lift; others follow unevenly.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Lift ascends with a jolt. Command Tower viewscreen shows the Colosseum Pit below, sand still churned from the match.
lines.stage_direction: Erik keys a side panel; arena records scroll—Khalid's veto tallies highlighted.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: See? Shell corp 9-Alpha. Pull that, his next vote dies. But exposure risk—your champion's aides get scanned post-match.
lines.stage_direction: Jabs the screen; highlight flickers.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Scan protocols optional. Log it as maintenance.
lines.stage_direction: Turns away, collar clip finally falling to the floor.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Optional leads to—
lines.stage_direction: Lift dings; doors open to Tower corridor.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Logs burn in my grip. Leverage on him. Or kneel deeper. The sand calls.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Got it. Shell 9-Alpha. We're armed.
lines.stage_direction: Pockets both chit and drive, turning toward the exit ramp.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Group disperses into Tower shadows. Zephyr's boot prints arena sand on the grated floor.
lines.stage_direction: Ramp leads down to Barracks transit.

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to Zephyr descending alone, micro-drive heavy in his pocket.

vn_scene.title: Sweat and Senate Shadows
vn_scene.setting: Champion's Victory Chamber — lavish suite with plush zero-grav loungers, scent-diffusing vents humming low, panoramic arena view flickering with post-fight replays, Khalid's combat boots discarded by a trophy case.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The chamber door seals with a hiss. Khalid sprawls on the zero-grav lounger, one massive foot propped on the edge, sole upturned and glistening from the pit.
lines.stage_direction: [Door seals behind Zephyr. Vents push warm, musky air.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: On your knees, boy. Clean what the crowd cheered for.
lines.stage_direction: [His foot flexes, sweat beading along the arch.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Right away, champ. Can't let that victory sweat go to waste, huh?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr drops to knees on the heated floor tiles, eyes flicking to the senate broadcast panel half-buried under gear.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *The panel's glow—senate veto logs. One question, casual, and it's mine. Keep it light.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr leans in. Tongue drags slow across the sole, salt bursting sharp with arena grit. Musk floods his nose, thick from hours under boot.
lines.stage_direction: [His hands grip the ankle, fingers digging into damp skin.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Slower. Taste it proper.
lines.stage_direction: [His free hand rests on Zephyr's head, thumb stroking hair—not pushing.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mmm—yeah, like that? Salty as fringe dust storms.
lines.stage_direction: [Licks between toes, breath hitching on the humid tang. Eyes dart to the panel again.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Body's betraying already. Focus—ask about the veto. Cassius needs it.*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Hey, that last veto you pulled—senate was pissed, right? What'd they say off-record?
lines.stage_direction: [Tongue circles the heel, pulling back to speak, saliva stringing.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Why you asking? Tongue's got other work.
lines.stage_direction: [Foot presses firmer to Zephyr's mouth. Doesn't answer.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Just... curious. Licking better with stories, y'know? Like that time with the Cassius vote—
lines.stage_direction: [He laps faster, words tumbling, hand sliding up calf toward thigh.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Enough. Back to work.
lines.stage_direction: [Pulls foot away abruptly. Replants it, toes splaying against lips. Senate panel blinks ignored.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Pushed too soon. Heat's crawling up my spine—his scent's everywhere.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr chases the foot, mouth open. No pause. Sweat smears his chin as he sucks the big toe, eyes watering from musk overload.
lines.stage_direction: [His own arousal tents his shorts, ignored. A loose comm bead slips from his collar, rolling under the lounger.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Good boy. Deeper.
lines.stage_direction: [Other hand cups Zephyr's jaw, guiding. Voice softens like gravel under rain.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Y-yeah... deeper...
lines.stage_direction: [Tongue probes under the arch, body shuddering. Wrong turn—pleasure blanks the question.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Not just sweat. He's holding back—affection? No, use it.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Stay like this. My pretty fighter.
lines.stage_direction: [Fingers trace Zephyr's ear. Pulls him off suddenly, boot print red on cheek.]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Comm bead under lounger buzzes once—faint, ignored. Zephyr blinks, haze cracking.
lines.stage_direction: [Sweat-slick face lifts. Bead's edge catches arena light.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Your... fighter? Senate'd laugh.
lines.stage_direction: [Twitches toward bead, stops. Hand fists on thigh.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: They laugh till I make 'em kneel.
lines.stage_direction: [Eyes narrow at the twitch. Foot returns, pinning chin up.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Cassius's warning—brace. That buzz. He's watching. I slipped.*

vn_scene.transition_out: [Screen glitches—Cassius's shadowed face flickers on the senate panel, eyes locked on Zephyr.]

vn_scene.title: Confrontation with Doubt
vn_scene.setting: Underground Gladiator Barracks: Cramped bunks slick with condensation, hygiene pod hissing steam, neon strips flickering over discarded wraps and a half-empty hydration tube.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The hygiene pod door slides shut behind Zephyr with a wet click. Steam curls from his shoulders. Cassius stands by the bunk, arms crossed. Tomas Ruiz slumps on the lower rack, picking at a frayed wrap on his ankle.
lines.stage_direction: [Steam drifts toward the flickering neon strip above the bunks]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Zephyr. You return from the Pit with sand still in your hair. And that look. Like you've swallowed the wrong pill.
lines.stage_direction: [Cassius's gravelly voice cuts through the pod's hiss. He steps forward, boot nudging the loose comm bead on the floor]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Sand? That's the Colosseum's love bite, Cassius. Stings less than your stare. What's got you pacing my bunk like a debt collector?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr wipes his neck with a towel, flicking droplets toward the metal floor. They splatter near Cassius's boot]

vn_scene.title: Overt Aid and Exposure
vn_scene.setting: Overseer's Command Tower — armored viewports hum with drone feeds from the pit below, rule-enforcement consoles blink red under a haze of recycled air thick with sweat.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Erik's fingers hover over the veto console. The screen flashes Khalid's champion override code. Towering viewports frame the pit's distant roar.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik's console beeps insistently]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Protocol 47-B. Champion veto denied. Fighter vitals stable—no incapacitation flagged.
lines.stage_direction: [He taps override, screen locks green]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Wait— you're blocking him? Just like that? Erik, that's...
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr leans forward, collar comm bead dangling loose from earlier slip]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Denied? On what grounds, overseer? That twink's tongue was on my boot five minutes ago.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid steps closer, boot sole grinding arena sand across the console floor]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Sand from his boot. Still damp. The smell hits—hits harder than it should.*

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Grounds? Vitals log. No yield signal. Check the drone feed yourself.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik slides a holopad across, not meeting Khalid's eyes]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: See? Rules are rules, champ. Can't veto what didn't happen. Or... did it?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr smirks, but fingers twitch toward the loose comm bead on the floor]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Rules. Always rules when it's convenient.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid pauses, boot nudging the comm bead closer to Zephyr's foot—stops short]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Drones whir outside. Erik's hand rests on the console edge, knuckles pale.
lines.stage_direction: [No one moves for the bead]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: It's logged. Senate will see it.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Senate. Yeah, Cassius's probably grinning down there already. This changes—
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr reaches for the bead—fumbles it under the console]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Changes what? Your little rebellion? Or just your addiction?
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid crouches slow, massive frame blocking the viewport light, eyes on Zephyr]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *His shadow covers me. Bead's gone—signal's live. Cassius hears this?*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Addiction? Nah, that's your kink talking. I'm just here for the show.
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr laughs sharp—voice cracks halfway]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Enough. Decision stands. Clear the tower.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik turns to a side panel, back to them—too rigid]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: You first, overseer. Explain this to the pit cams.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid straightens, hand clamps Zephyr's shoulder—pulls him half off balance]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr stumbles into Khalid's grip. The console blinks: veto blocked, logged.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid's boot hovers over the console's exposed wire]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Loyalty, pet. Whose is it? Mine—or his?
lines.stage_direction: [Grip tightens; pit roar swells through viewport]

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to Khalid's shadowed glare over Zephyr's shoulder, pit lights flaring.

vn_scene.title: The Challenge and Defeat
vn_scene.setting: Central Colosseum Pit: tiered hologrids packed with roaring spectators, force-field barriers humming, sweat and plasma smoke thick in the air

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The crowd's roar shakes the pit floor. Zephyr circles Khalid, pulse blade humming in his grip.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr dodges a swing, sweat dripping from his brow.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: You think that bulk makes you invincible, big man? Senate veto's mine today—your reign's over.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr lunges, blade sparking off Khalid's shield.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Boy from the rim. Swing wild. See where it lands.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid plants his feet, massive arms flexing, a bead of sweat rolling down his chest.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *His sweat hits the air first—salty, thick. Focus, Raf. One slip and colony's dust.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Khalid's boot slams down. Zephyr twists away, but the shockwave buckles his knee.
lines.stage_direction: Dust kicks up around Khalid's bare toes, gripping the grated floor.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cheap trick—using the pit's vibes like that? Fight fair, or the crowd calls foul!
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr rolls to his feet, blade whining as he feints left.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Fair? Pit eats the weak. Yield.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid advances, closing the gap in two strides.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr darts in close—too close. Khalid's elbow clips his jaw. The blade skitters across the pit.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr hits the ground hard, tasting blood and grit.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Get up. Veto. Autonomy. Not his... musk clogging my throat.*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Not... done. You haven't—
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr scrambles for the blade, fingers brushing metal.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Done enough.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's boot pins Zephyr's wrist. The crowd erupts.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Pressure builds. Bone creaks. Zephyr's arm goes slack.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's sole presses down, callused skin warm against Zephyr's pulse.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Yield! Kriff—yield!
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr thrashes once, then stills.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Mine now. Kneel. Kiss the foot that broke you.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid lifts his boot, sweat-glistened toes flexing inches from Zephyr's face. Hologrids amplify the moment.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Lips to that? Public? How far's he dragging this in private...*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr hesitates. The pit holds its breath. Then his lips brush skin—salty, heated.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's toes curl slightly against the touch.

vn_scene.title: First Taste of Submission
vn_scene.setting: Champion's Victory Chamber — lavish suite with plush zero-grav loungers, scent-diffusing vents humming softly, panoramic window showing the empty arena floor below.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The chamber door seals with a hiss. Khalid towers over the zero-grav lounger, unlacing his arena boots. One hits the floor with a wet thud. Steam rises from the insole.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's massive frame blocks the light from the vents.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Kneel, pretty one. You've earned a closer look at victory.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Earned? You mean lost. Big difference, champ.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr drops to his knees on the cool tile, eyes flicking to the boot.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *That steam. It's curling up like it's got a mind.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Loss is just the boot before the real fight. Sniff.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid peels off the boot, flexing his bare foot inches from Zephyr's face. Damp sock clings.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: What, no fanfare? No senate feed for this part?
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr leans in a fraction, nostrils flaring against his will.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The sock sags heavy with sweat. A vinegary tang cuts the chamber's sterile air. Zephyr's inhale drags deeper than planned.
lines.stage_direction: His hands hover at his sides, fingers curling.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Fanfare's for crowds. This is mine. Deeper.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Yours? Like a trophy boot? Real classy—
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's nose presses into the damp fabric. He pulls back half an inch, then stops.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *It's in my lungs now. Earthy, like colony dirt after rain. Why isn't that pushing me away?*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Classy? Like the mud pits I crawled from? Keep going.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid's foot shifts, sole brushing Zephyr's cheek, leaving a faint smear.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mud pits. Yeah, explains the smell. Not complaining, just—stating facts.
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's breath hitches. His tongue flicks out, tasting salt unbidden.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Vents hum. Zephyr's knees shift on the tile, but his face stays close. The sock darkens further under his exhale.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Facts don't lick. Prove you're mine.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid peels the sock free. Bare foot, glistening, arches toward Zephyr's mouth.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Prove? In here? Without the pit's roar? That's your power trip?
lines.stage_direction: Zephyr's lips part. He inhales sharply—too sharp. His hands grip his own thighs.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *The taste hit first. Now it's everywhere. Can't think past the next breath.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Trips are for weaklings. Worship.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr's mouth closes over the toes. Suckling sounds mix with the vents. Khalid's hand rests on his head—not pushing, just there. Zephyr trembles once, then stills.
lines.stage_direction: Sweat beads on Zephyr's temple, distinct from the foot's.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mmph. Satisfied, champ?
lines.stage_direction: He pulls off, chin slick, eyes up but not meeting Khalid's.

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Not yet. But you'll get there.
lines.stage_direction: Khalid withdraws his foot, flexing it. Leaves the sock on the floor between them.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Allies. Encrypted line. Before this pulls me under. Before he sees.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr stands slowly. The arena view glints through the window. The discarded sock steams faintly on the tile.

vn_scene.transition_out: Slow fade on the sock, steam curling.

vn_scene.title: Encrypted Warning
vn_scene.setting: Underground Gladiator Barracks: Cramped metal bunks slick with humidity, flickering neon strips buzzing over a communal hygiene pod leaking steam.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Cassius hunches on the lower bunk, his broad frame compressing the thin mattress. Zephyr paces the narrow aisle between bunks, boot soles sticking slightly to the grated floor.
lines.stage_direction: [Flickering neon casts shadows on damp walls]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cassius, you won't believe the access Khalid's giving me now. Champion's aide? That's a senate veto in my pocket—our pocket. We hit their next vote hard.
lines.stage_direction: [Leans in close, fingers drumming on a rusted bunk frame]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Access like a river cuts stone, but floods the careless bank. This position—it's no mere step, Zephyr. The champion's shadow clings.
lines.stage_direction: [Eyes the hygiene pod's steam curling toward them]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Clings? Come on, it's intel gold. I saw the rosters—three senators flagged for bribes. We leak that through your channels, and boom, reform wave.
lines.stage_direction: [Stops pacing, wipes sweat from his neck with his sleeve]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: His voice drags like gravel over my plans. Why's the pod dripping louder now?

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Bribes. Rosters. Such details dazzle the eye, blind it to the pit beneath. You've been... close to him. Too close. That sweat on you—it's not just the barracks' damp.
lines.stage_direction: [Gestures vaguely at Zephyr's damp collar, then drops his hand]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: What, this? Arena residue, Cassius. You think I'm—ha, that's rich. Me, clouded? By a bit of post-fight grime? Let's stick to the veto play.
lines.stage_direction: [Snorts, tugs at his collar, but his fingers linger on the fabric]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Grime... washes off. Some scents—
lines.stage_direction: [Trails off, stares at the floor grate where water pools]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. The neon flickers once, twice. Zephyr's boot taps the grate, sending a ripple through the puddle.
lines.stage_direction: [Steam from the pod drifts between them]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Scents? You're spinning proverbs again. If you're warning me off the champion's funk, save it. This is strategy, not—look, the plot holds if we move now.
lines.stage_direction: [Steps closer, voice speeding up]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Funk. He said it. My throat tightens around the word I won't say.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Strategy demands clear eyes. Yours—fixed on his boots, his commands. One slip in that Victory Chamber, whispers reach the Overseer. Plots exposed. All eroded to dust.
lines.stage_direction: [Leans forward abruptly, bunk creaking under his weight]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Boots? That's your big read? I yield in the pit to survive, not sniff around like some—fine, exposure risk noted. But we need this.
lines.stage_direction: [Fists clench, then unclench at his sides]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr turns toward the pod, hand hovering near the control panel but not touching it.
lines.stage_direction: [His reflection warps in the steamed mirror]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Need. The word that topples empires. Brace for the spectacle ahead—it will test.
lines.stage_direction: [Stands halfway, then sinks back, hand gripping the bunk edge]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Test. The word hangs. Neon buzzes. My sleeve still smells like him.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr straightens, eyes on the distant ladder to the Colosseum Pit.
lines.stage_direction: [Puddle ripples from his shifting weight]

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to black on the flickering neon and rising steam.

vn_scene.title: Allies and Hidden Aid
vn_scene.setting: Senate Shadow Alcove, dim-lit with encrypted terminals flickering blue, air thick with recycled heat and faint metallic tang, transitioning to Overseer's Command Tower via shadowed lift

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Holo-screens cast jagged light on the alcove walls. Zephyr leans against a damp terminal console, sleeve still carrying arena sand.
lines.stage_direction: Screens flicker with senate vote tallies.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Cassius, this slip in the pit—crowd ate it up, but Khalid's not blind. We turn that heat into our blade, yeah? Who's the new face?
lines.stage_direction: Gestures at Tomas Ruiz, who stands rigid by the door panel.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Tomas Ruiz. Fought under my banner in the Epsilon uprising. Lost his squad to senate asset grabs. Now he tallies the ledgers they don't want seen.
lines.stage_direction: Nods to Tomas, who pulls a slim data chit from his vest pocket.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: Records show champions' vetoes routed through shell corps. Khalid's next vote—it's primed for a freeze if we tag the right relay.
lines.stage_direction: Slides the chit across the console; it skids into a puddle of condensation.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Chit gleams wet. Like the pit floor under his boot. Focus, Raf—relay codes, not the taste.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Relay? Which one—the prime hub or those fringe backups? We hit wrong, it's exile tags for all—
lines.stage_direction: Fingers drum the console edge, speeding up.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Patience carves the stone. Prime hub's watched. Fringes...
lines.stage_direction: Trails off as the alcove door hisses open.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Erik Lindqvist steps in, overseer badge clipped loose on his collar. He doesn't sit. A loose wire dangles from his gauntlet.
lines.stage_direction: Door seals with a dull thud.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Protocol 47-C: no unscheduled clusters in shadow zones. But your relay query—fringes link to my tower logs. Encrypted slice, one-time.
lines.stage_direction: Tosses a micro-drive; it bounces once before Zephyr snags it.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Tower logs? Erik, you're handing us Khalid's veto printout? That's—wait, one-time? What if the encryption pings back?
lines.stage_direction: Pockets the drive, but eyes flick to Tomas's clenched fist on the chit.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: It'll ping. Always does. My squad got fragged on a 'one-time' tip. You gladiators play submissive—you don't last.
lines.stage_direction: Snatches the wet chit back, wiping it on his thigh.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Tomas's thigh—sweat-dark fabric. Not now. But the drive's warm in my pocket, like skin.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Uprisings teach—
lines.stage_direction: Cuts off as Erik gestures sharply.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.stage_direction: Points to the lift panel without a word.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Lift doors grind open. No one moves first.
lines.stage_direction: Terminals hum louder in the gap.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Tower it is, then. Show us the logs, Overseer. But if this is a rule bend that snaps—
lines.stage_direction: Steps into the lift; others follow unevenly.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Lift ascends with a jolt. Command Tower viewscreen shows the Colosseum Pit below, sand still churned from the match.
lines.stage_direction: Erik keys a side panel; arena records scroll—Khalid's veto tallies highlighted.

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: See? Shell corp 9-Alpha. Pull that, his next vote dies. But exposure risk—your champion's aides get scanned post-match.
lines.stage_direction: Jabs the screen; highlight flickers.

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Scan protocols optional. Log it as maintenance.
lines.stage_direction: Turns away, collar clip finally falling to the floor.

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Optional leads to—
lines.stage_direction: Lift dings; doors open to Tower corridor.

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: Logs burn in my grip. Leverage on him. Or kneel deeper. The sand calls.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Got it. Shell 9-Alpha. We're armed.
lines.stage_direction: Pockets both chit and drive, turning toward the exit ramp.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Group disperses into Tower shadows. Zephyr's boot prints arena sand on the grated floor.
lines.stage_direction: Ramp leads down to Barracks transit.

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to Zephyr descending alone, micro-drive heavy in his pocket.

vn_scene.title: Sweat and Senate Shadows
vn_scene.setting: Champion's Victory Chamber — lavish suite with plush zero-grav loungers, scent-diffusing vents humming low, panoramic arena view flickering with post-fight replays, Khalid's combat boots discarded by a trophy case.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The chamber door seals with a hiss. Khalid sprawls on the zero-grav lounger, one massive foot propped on the edge, sole upturned and glistening from the pit.
lines.stage_direction: [Door seals behind Zephyr. Vents push warm, musky air.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: On your knees, boy. Clean what the crowd cheered for.
lines.stage_direction: [His foot flexes, sweat beading along the arch.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Right away, champ. Can't let that victory sweat go to waste, huh?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr drops to knees on the heated floor tiles, eyes flicking to the senate broadcast panel half-buried under gear.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *The panel's glow—senate veto logs. One question, casual, and it's mine. Keep it light.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr leans in. Tongue drags slow across the sole, salt bursting sharp with arena grit. Musk floods his nose, thick from hours under boot.
lines.stage_direction: [His hands grip the ankle, fingers digging into damp skin.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Slower. Taste it proper.
lines.stage_direction: [His free hand rests on Zephyr's head, thumb stroking hair—not pushing.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Mmm—yeah, like that? Salty as fringe dust storms.
lines.stage_direction: [Licks between toes, breath hitching on the humid tang. Eyes dart to the panel again.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Body's betraying already. Focus—ask about the veto. Cassius needs it.*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Hey, that last veto you pulled—senate was pissed, right? What'd they say off-record?
lines.stage_direction: [Tongue circles the heel, pulling back to speak, saliva stringing.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Why you asking? Tongue's got other work.
lines.stage_direction: [Foot presses firmer to Zephyr's mouth. Doesn't answer.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Just... curious. Licking better with stories, y'know? Like that time with the Cassius vote—
lines.stage_direction: [He laps faster, words tumbling, hand sliding up calf toward thigh.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Enough. Back to work.
lines.stage_direction: [Pulls foot away abruptly. Replants it, toes splaying against lips. Senate panel blinks ignored.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Pushed too soon. Heat's crawling up my spine—his scent's everywhere.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr chases the foot, mouth open. No pause. Sweat smears his chin as he sucks the big toe, eyes watering from musk overload.
lines.stage_direction: [His own arousal tents his shorts, ignored. A loose comm bead slips from his collar, rolling under the lounger.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Good boy. Deeper.
lines.stage_direction: [Other hand cups Zephyr's jaw, guiding. Voice softens like gravel under rain.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Y-yeah... deeper...
lines.stage_direction: [Tongue probes under the arch, body shuddering. Wrong turn—pleasure blanks the question.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Not just sweat. He's holding back—affection? No, use it.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Stay like this. My pretty fighter.
lines.stage_direction: [Fingers trace Zephyr's ear. Pulls him off suddenly, boot print red on cheek.]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Comm bead under lounger buzzes once—faint, ignored. Zephyr blinks, haze cracking.
lines.stage_direction: [Sweat-slick face lifts. Bead's edge catches arena light.]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Your... fighter? Senate'd laugh.
lines.stage_direction: [Twitches toward bead, stops. Hand fists on thigh.]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: They laugh till I make 'em kneel.
lines.stage_direction: [Eyes narrow at the twitch. Foot returns, pinning chin up.]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Cassius's warning—brace. That buzz. He's watching. I slipped.*

vn_scene.transition_out: [Screen glitches—Cassius's shadowed face flickers on the senate panel, eyes locked on Zephyr.]

vn_scene.title: Confrontation with Doubt
vn_scene.setting: Underground Gladiator Barracks: Cramped bunks slick with condensation, hygiene pod hissing steam, neon strips flickering over discarded wraps and a half-empty hydration tube.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: The hygiene pod door slides shut behind Zephyr with a wet click. Steam curls from his shoulders. Cassius stands by the bunk, arms crossed. Tomas Ruiz slumps on the lower rack, picking at a frayed wrap on his ankle.
lines.stage_direction: [Steam drifts toward the flickering neon strip above the bunks]

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Zephyr. You return from the Pit with sand still in your hair. And that look. Like you've swallowed the wrong pill.
lines.stage_direction: [Cassius's gravelly voice cuts through the pod's hiss. He steps forward, boot nudging the loose comm bead on the floor]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Sand? That's the Colosseum's love bite, Cassius. Stings less than your stare. What's got you pacing my bunk like a debt collector?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr wipes his neck with a towel, flicking droplets toward the metal floor. They splatter near Cassius's boot]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *His boot. Crushed that bead like it meant nothing. Mine rolled in the sand too. Focus on the plan, not the... residue.*

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Pacing? No. Observing. You knelt longer than victory demands. Tongue out like a pup. Tomas saw the holo-feed. The senate alcove replayed it thrice.
lines.stage_direction: [Cassius gestures at the cracked data slate on the bunk, paused on Zephyr's face in the Pit sand]

lines.speaker: TOMAS RUIZ
lines.text: It wasn't clean, Raf. Crowd ate it up. But you... lingered.
lines.stage_direction: [Tomas shifts on the bunk, his ankle wrap unraveling further into a pile]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Lingered? Tactical pause, boys. Khalid thinks he owns the moment—let him. We flip it in the next veto vote. Cassius, your senate play's still gold, right? Tell me we're synced.
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr leans in, clapping Cassius's shoulder too hard, then pulls back as the towel slips from his grip to the floor]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Shoulder solid. Not like his. No musk. No press. Why's the pod steam smell wrong now?*

lines.speaker: YOON DOWAN
lines.text: Synced. Like a gladiator synced to the whip. You jest, but empires fall on such slips. One whiff of weakness, and Tomas here—
lines.stage_direction: [Cassius cuts off, eyes flicking to Tomas. Silence stretches. The neon buzzes louder.]

vn_scene.title: Overt Aid and Exposure
vn_scene.setting: Overseer's Command Tower — armored viewports hum with drone feeds from the pit below, rule-enforcement consoles blink red under a haze of recycled air thick with sweat.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Erik's fingers hover over the veto console. The screen flashes Khalid's champion override code. Towering viewports frame the pit's distant roar.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik's console beeps insistently]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Protocol 47-B. Champion veto denied. Fighter vitals stable—no incapacitation flagged.
lines.stage_direction: [He taps override, screen locks green]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Wait— you're blocking him? Just like that? Erik, that's...
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr leans forward, collar comm bead dangling loose from earlier slip]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Denied? On what grounds, overseer? That twink's tongue was on my boot five minutes ago.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid steps closer, boot sole grinding arena sand across the console floor]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Sand from his boot. Still damp. The smell hits—hits harder than it should.*

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Grounds? Vitals log. No yield signal. Check the drone feed yourself.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik slides a holopad across, not meeting Khalid's eyes]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: See? Rules are rules, champ. Can't veto what didn't happen. Or... did it?
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr smirks, but fingers twitch toward the loose comm bead on the floor]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Rules. Always rules when it's convenient.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid pauses, boot nudging the comm bead closer to Zephyr's foot—stops short]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Silence stretches. Drones whir outside. Erik's hand rests on the console edge, knuckles pale.
lines.stage_direction: [No one moves for the bead]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: It's logged. Senate will see it.

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Senate. Yeah, Cassius's probably grinning down there already. This changes—
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr reaches for the bead—fumbles it under the console]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Changes what? Your little rebellion? Or just your addiction?
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid crouches slow, massive frame blocking the viewport light, eyes on Zephyr]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *His shadow covers me. Bead's gone—signal's live. Cassius hears this?*

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Addiction? Nah, that's your kink talking. I'm just here for the show.
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr laughs sharp—voice cracks halfway]

lines.speaker: ERIK LINDQUIST
lines.text: Enough. Decision stands. Clear the tower.
lines.stage_direction: [Erik turns to a side panel, back to them—too rigid]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: You first, overseer. Explain this to the pit cams.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid straightens, hand clamps Zephyr's shoulder—pulls him half off balance]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr stumbles into Khalid's grip. The console blinks: veto blocked, logged.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid's boot hovers over the console's exposed wire]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Loyalty, pet. Whose is it? Mine—or his?
lines.stage_direction: [Grip tightens; pit roar swells through viewport]

vn_scene.transition_out: Cut to Khalid's shadowed glare over Zephyr's shoulder, pit lights flaring.

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Crowd roars shake the pit floor. Hologrid tiers pulse red. Khalid's boot pins Zephyr's chest to the blood-warm sand.
lines.stage_direction: [Khalid's massive frame blocks the lights, shadow swallowing Zephyr's lithe body]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Kneel proper, pet. Show them.
lines.stage_direction: [Boot presses down, sole grinding into Zephyr's collarbone]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *That shard's edge bites my palm. Sharp enough for a throat. But his sweat drips on my lips first.*

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Private's for cowards. Lick.
lines.stage_direction: [Boot lifts from chest, plants on Zephyr's thigh, forcing legs apart. Toes flex, sockless and sweat-slick]

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Zephyr's tongue drags along the arch. Salt and arena grit flood his mouth. Crowd volume spikes—holo-screens magnify the smear.
lines.stage_direction: [His pretty face presses into the ball of the foot, nose buried in damp crevices]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Tastes like victory. Or is that just your fringe-dust poverty?
lines.stage_direction: [Sucks the big toe, eyes locked up Khalid's towering legs]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Keep talking. Makes the yield sweeter.
lines.stage_direction: [Other boot nudges Zephyr's chin up, smearing sweat across jaw]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *Haze creeps in. His musk coats my throat like smoke. Shard slips from my grip—sand swallows it.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION
lines.text: Khalid grinds down. Zephyr's mouth opens wider, tongue tracing veins. Cheers drown the shield hum.
lines.stage_direction: [Zephyr's hands grip ankle, pulling closer despite himself]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: You think this chains me? Erik's veto—it's live. Tower logs show your bribes.
lines.stage_direction: [Whispers against the sole, lips brushing during a long lick]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Lies don't stop the taste.
lines.stage_direction: [Boot pauses mid-grind. Crowd roars approval anyway]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE
lines.text: Prove it.
lines.stage_direction: [Presses harder, but thigh trembles once]

lines.speaker: INTERNAL
lines.text: *He didn't pull away. That's the break. Ecstasy hits—mine and his, shared in the roar.*

lines.speaker: NARRATION

lines.stage_direction: [Holo-grids flash 'CLAIMED' in gold across the dome]

lines.speaker: RAFAEL ESPINOZA
lines.text: Yield the veto. Or the senate sees the full drop.
lines.stage_direction: [Nuzzles the heel, breath hot against skin]

lines.speaker: OBIORA ACHEBE

lines.stage_direction: [Sweat beads roll down Khalid's calf, pooling where Zephyr's lips last pressed]
